class.name: FestivalKnowledge
class.brief_description: A single discoverable fact: a secret, rumor, password, schedule or route.
class.description: Knowledge is the game's real progression currency. It is learned during a run but recorded in the [FestivalNotebook], which persists across runs. A password learned too late in one run is already known at Morning of the next, which is exactly what unlocks earlier access and new branches.

members.member: The full text of the fact.
The raw Secret Census source record this knowledge was generated from, kept so no exported detail is lost.
Unique identifier stored by the notebook and referenced by interaction gates.
Optional id of the NPC this knowledge concerns.
Short title shown in the notebook.
If [code]false[/code], the belief is actually untrue (a false rumor).

constants.constant: A personal truth the subject guards carefully.
Something disturbing, dangerous or morally significant.
Something true that others say about the subject.
Something believed about the subject that is not true.
A phrase that grants access somewhere.
Knowledge of where or when an NPC will be.
Knowledge of a path or shortcut.
